theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 59 / 중기 64 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — Fib 0.618, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +42.5% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.5075 아래 손절가 $0.4557 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

timeframes.note: 가격이 50/200MA 위 + 골든 크로스 · RSI 과매수

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Market 'Yet to Fully Experience' Aluminum Shortfall from Iran, Says Timna Tanners
top_news.summary: Shortfalls could persist longer than current expectations and drive up the price of aluminum as an impact of war with Iran says Timna Tanners, managing director of equity research for Wells Fargo. Tanners talked about the different impacts of the war on commodity prices, including copper which neared record highs on Tuesday due to a rise in demand from China and fears about supplies of sulfur in the Mideast.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Ananym Capital Urges BWX to Make Commercial Nuclear Reactors
top_news.summary: Activist fund Ananym Capital Management is pushing nuclear technology company BWX Technologies Inc. to tap its nuclear reactor manufacturing capabilities for commercial use.

top_news.title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras to Guide IPO Pricing Above Range
top_news.summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. is guiding prospective investors that it expects to price its initial public offering above the top of its marketed range, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand soars for the chipmaker’s stock.

top_news.title: Mexico Rating Outlook Revised to Negative at S&P as Debts Mount
top_news.summary: S&P Global Ratings revised Mexico’s credit outlook to negative from stable, citing persistently weak fiscal results, rising debt levels and weak economic growth.

top_news.title: Brazil Meat Left Out of EU Suppliers List in Risk to Trade
top_news.summary: Brazil is absent from a list of countries authorized to supply animal products to the European Union, presenting a trade risk to the world’s largest beef and chicken exporter.

top_news.title: Japan’s Sojitz Eyes Southeast Asia for New Rare Earths Supply
top_news.summary: Japanese trading house Sojitz Corp. is looking to Southeast Asia and other regions as new potential sources of rare earths outside Australia, as it aims to boost output and diversify its supply chain of the highly sought-after materials.

top_news.title: CommScope Sued by Lenders for at Least $150 Million Over Alleged Breach
top_news.summary: CommScope Holding Co. was sued by a group of lenders who allege the telecommunications provider breached a debt agreement by failing to pay a prescribed premium of at least $150 million following a key asset sale.

top_news.title: Emerging-Market Currencies, Stocks Fall as Iran Truce Hopes Dim
top_news.summary: Emerging-market currencies and stocks fell Tuesday on concern the ceasefire between the US and Iran is on the brink of collapse, while a slump in South Korean shares also weighed on sentiment.

top_news.title: S&P 500 & NASDAQ Fall as Oil Jumps | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Debt, Inflation, Politics: UK Bonds Are Taking a Triple Hit
top_news.summary: As UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer slowly loses allies in government and fights for his survival, the escalating political drama is heaping fresh pressure onto a bond market already battered by the country’s deep-rooted fiscal and economic problems.
